SCHEDULE 8

PORTFOLIO CONCENTRATION LIMITS AND ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA

This Schedule sets out the Concentration Limits applicable to the Portfolio.
All percentages are expressed as a percentage of the Concentration Limit
Denominator (being the aggregate Current Balance of the Portfolio) unless
otherwise stated.

1. GEOGRAPHIC CONCENTRATION

1.1 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans secured on Properties located in
London (Greater London) must not exceed 30% of the Portfolio.

1.2 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans secured on Properties located in
the South East must not exceed 30% of the Portfolio.

1.3 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans secured on Properties located in
any other single region must not exceed 15% of the Portfolio.

1.4 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans secured on Properties located in
Scotland must not exceed 10% of the Portfolio.

2. BROKER / INTERMEDIARY CONCENTRATION

2.1 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans introduced by any single broker or
intermediary must not exceed 20% of the Portfolio.

2.2 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans introduced by the top 3 brokers
must not exceed 45% of the Portfolio.

3. LOAN SIZE CONCENTRATION

3.1 The Current Balance of any single Loan must not exceed 2% of the Portfolio.

3.2 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans with a Current Balance greater than
GBP 1,000,000 must not exceed 10% of the Portfolio.

4. LOAN TO VALUE

4.1 The weighted average Current Loan to Value of the Portfolio must not exceed
35%.

4.2 No Loan may have a Current Loan to Value greater than 50% at origination.

5. INTEREST RATE

5.1 The aggregate Current Balance of Loans bearing a variable rate of interest
must not exceed 90% of the Portfolio.

6. BORROWER CONCENTRATION

6.1 The aggregate Current Balance attributable to any single Borrower (or group
of connected Borrowers) must not exceed 10% of the Portfolio.

6.2 No single Borrower may have more than 5 Loans in the Portfolio.

6.3 The aggregate Current Balance attributable to joint Borrowers should be
monitored and reported, subject to the prevailing eligibility policy.

7. BORROWER AGE

7.1 The aggregate Current Balance attributable to Borrowers aged over 85 at
origination must not exceed 0% of the Portfolio (no such Loans are permitted).
